claim_statement: For scalar transport across conformally flat patches, continuity of the scalar and normal flux yields a dimension-dependent conformal prefactor in the interface condition.

local_model.name: conformally-flat scalar transport
local_model.scope: Riemannian patches with metric g = Omega^2 delta and conserved scalar current
assumptions: constant scalar transport coefficient per side

boundary_or_interface.statement: [Omega^(n-2) partial_n phi]_Sigma = 0 with scalar continuity across Sigma.
boundary_or_interface.dimension_notes: The exponent is n-2; n=2 drops the conformal factor and n=3 gives Omega^1.
limits: does not apply unchanged to arbitrary non-conformally-flat or Lorentzian metrics

non_claims: Does not claim thermodynamic bounds are bypassed.
Does not claim arbitrary porous media realize the ideal interface law without measurement.
known_limits: Engineering realization requires graded material coefficients and disorder bounds.
